Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5078 0 0}Have you ever read the manga Titanium Chef?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was curious about how the series would end since it suddenly switched publishers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}I'm just glad I finally got to finish it. Thanks for coming, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}The art in this manga is incredible... All the food looks so delicious![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5063 0 0}Have you ever filleted a fish before?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}To be honest, I can't stand touching raw fish. They're kinda slimy, and stinky too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Plus, I'm clumsy with a knife...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}But maybe I could learn by example. Would you show me how to do it next time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka seems impressed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}But I thought you had home economics?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 3 25 25}I'm actually pretty clumsy with a knife, so I can't even fillet a fish myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}How am I going to get better at cooking if I can't learn basic knife skills...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka seems down...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}Well, I guess there are plenty of other cheap and tasty dishes to choose from these days.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka is smiling.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about her today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}I'm in the mood to cook now after reading Titanium Chef.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}I think I'll buy some ingredients before heading home. Maybe I could get some vegetables that are in season.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After shopping with Fuuka,[n]I decided to return to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
